author: stock-sum
description: Request stock-sum reports through a Discord slash command.
install_msg: Set STOCK_SUM_HTTP_TOKEN for the Redbot process, make sure stock-sum daemon is running, then sync slash commands.
short: Slash command bridge for stock-sum reports.
name: stocksum_report
end_user_data_statement: This cog sends Discord user requests to a local stock-sum HTTP service and does not persist Discord user data.
